info.name: ScanMyFood API
info.description:
API collection for the ScanMyFood Backend - a Spring Boot application for food scanning and nutritional analysis.

## Base URL
`http://localhost:8080`

## Features
- AI-powered food and product image analysis
- User management and onboarding
- Health metrics tracking
- Daily intake monitoring

## Response Format
All responses follow the standard ApiResponse format:
```json
{
  "status": "success" | "error",
  "message": "optional message",
  "data": { ... }
}
```

item.name: Health
item.description: Health check endpoints for monitoring service status

item.name: AI Analysis

formdata.description: Nutrition label image of the product

request.description:
Analyze a food image using AI to identify food items and estimate nutritional content.

**Request:**
- Content-Type: multipart/form-data
- image: Food image file

**Response:**
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "data": {
    "mealName": "string",
    "analyzedFoodItems": [...],
    "totalPlateNutrients": [...]
  }
}
```

Generate a professional food photography image from a text description using AI (Gemini 2.5 Flash Image model).

**Request Body:**
```json
{
  "description": "string - description of the food/meal to generate"
}
```

**Example descriptions:**
- "A bowl of pasta with tomato sauce and fresh basil"
- "Grilled salmon with steamed vegetables"
- "A stack of fluffy pancakes with maple syrup and berries"

**Response:**
- Content-Type: image/png
- Content-Disposition: inline; filename="generated-food.png"
- Body: Raw PNG image bytes

**Features:**
- Professional food photography style (Canon EOS R5)
- 16:9 landscape format, 8K resolution
- Natural soft daylight lighting
- Restaurant quality presentation
- Appropriate cutlery and dinnerware
- Steam effect for hot dishes

item.description: AI-powered endpoints for analyzing food images and product labels

item.name: Users

request.description:
Save or update user health metrics.

**Request Body:**
```json
{
  "firebaseUid": "string",
  "heightFeet": number,
  "heightInches": number,
  "weightKg": number,
  "goal": "string" (e.g., "lose_weight", "gain_weight", "maintain")
}
```

**Response:**
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "data": {
    "success": true,
    "message": "Health metrics saved successfully"
  }
}
```

item.description: User management endpoints for registration, onboarding, and preferences

item.name: User Intake

formdata.description: JSON object containing userId and food analysis response

request.description:
Save a scanned food item with its analysis to the user's intake history.

**Request:**
- Content-Type: multipart/form-data
- foodImage: Image file of the food
- saveScannedFoodInput: JSON object with userId and foodAnalysisResponse

**saveScannedFoodInput structure:**
```json
{
  "userId": "string",
  "foodAnalysisResponse": {
    "mealName": "string",
    "analyzedFoodItems": [...],
    "totalPlateNutrients": [...]
  }
}
```

**Response:**
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "message": "Scanned food intake saved successfully."
}
```

formdata.description: JSON object containing userId and product analysis response

request.description:
Get the user's food intake for a specific date.

**Query Parameters:**
- userId: Firebase User ID
- date: Date in YYYY-MM-DD format (LocalDate)

**Response:**
- 200 OK with intake data
- 204 No Content if no intake records found for the date

```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "message": "Daily intake fetched successfully.",
  "data": {
    "foodAnalysisResponse": [...]
  }
}
```

item.description: Endpoints for tracking and managing user food intake
